creator: nick.hibma@jrc.it
text:
mSQL is not freely available for download anymore. You
	have to register to get the software.

Fix: 

Download files first and add to /usr/ports/distfiles
	before doing a make;make install in the 
	/usr/ports/databases/msql
	directory.
	Suggested by maintainer: Add a text explaining how and where
	to fetch the package manually when doing a make without the
	package being available. Mentioned other port doing the same
	but I do not remember which one that is.
How-To-Repeat: 
	n.a.
